slides.speakerNotes:
Slide 1 — Opening

"Welcome, everyone, and thanks for joining. [pause] Today we're going to walk through three things: why this matters now, what we've built so far, and where we go next."

Slide 2 — The problem

"Let me start with the problem, because it's the reason all of this exists. [pause] Our teams are spending most of their time on the mechanics of the work instead of the judgment inside the work — and that ratio has to change."
